title: Fast Mend
description: This is an Mod Fully Customizable it Can increase the xp speed From cps 1 upto 50
body:
✨ Features

⚡ Auto Right Click XP Bottles
Automatically throws XP bottles for fast mending.

🎯 Adjustable CPS (1–50)
Fully customizable click speed.

⌨️ Toggle Keybind (Default: H)
Instantly enable or disable the mod anytime.

🎮 Visible in Minecraft Controls
Keybind appears in Minecraft Controls settings.

⚙️ Config Menu Support
Easy configuration through Cloth Config + Mod Menu.

📺 HUD Status Display
Shows MendFast ON / OFF on screen.

🧪 Smart Activation
Only works while holding XP bottles.

🕒 Smooth Click Timing
Stable and natural click intervals.

🛡️ Safe Client-side Utility
No server installation required.

☕ Java 21 Compatible
Built for latest Fabric environments.
